seo.title: Albedo Build Guide — GenshinGuide
seo.description: Complete Albedo build guide for Genshin Impact v4.8. Best weapons ranked (Cinnabar Spindle, Harbinger of Dawn), optimal artifacts (Husk of Opulent Dreams, Golden Troupe), team compositions (Mono Geo, Double Geo), and rotation guide.

intro: Albedo is a premium Geo off-field sub-DPS: his E creates a field where enemies take Geo DMG every 2 seconds. His damage scales entirely off DEF, making him easy to build with "unwanted" artifacts. He fits perfectly into Mono Geo teams and any team that wants a flex slot with consistent off-field damage and EM buffing via his Q. This guide covers everything you need to build him optimally in v4.8.
weapon_bottom_line: Cinnabar Spindle R5 (event exclusive) is BiS with massive DEF% and E DMG bonus. Harbinger of Dawn R5 (3★) is shockingly competitive for F2P — just keep HP above 90%.

weapons.name: Cinnabar Spindle R5
weapons.notes: Event exclusive BiS. Massive DEF% + 80% E DMG bonus. Unmatched.

weapons.name: Harbinger of Dawn R5
weapons.notes: Best F2P. Huge CRIT stats when HP > 90%. Albedo is off-field so easy to maintain.

weapons.name: Primordial Jade Cutter
weapons.notes: 5★ stat stick. Massive CRIT Rate. No DEF but pure stats carry it.

weapons.name: Festering Desire
weapons.notes: Event sword. E DMG + CRIT boost. Good if Cinnabar was missed.

artifact_alt: 4pc Golden Troupe (similar performance to Husk, slightly better in some teams). 4pc Husk is the goal for most builds.

main_stats.sands_note: Always DEF%. Albedo's E damage scales with DEF, not ATK.
main_stats.goblet_note: Always Geo DMG. DEF% goblet is a damage loss.

sub_priority: DEF% (as high as possible — 2500+ DEF target)
CRIT Rate / CRIT DMG (1:2 ratio — 60/120 is solid)
Energy Recharge (Q gives 125 EM to team — useful to burst)
ATK% (lowest priority — Albedo scales on DEF, not ATK)

teams.name: Team 1: Mono Geo
teams.desc: Itto + Albedo + Gorou + Zhongli. The premium Geo team. Gorou buffs all Geo, Albedo provides massive off-field DPS, Zhongli shreds RES. Itto is the hypercarry.

teams.name: Team 2: Double Geo Flex
teams.desc: Albedo + Zhongli + any DPS duo. Geo resonance + Zhongli shred + Albedo off-field DMG. Fits Xiao, Hu Tao, Yoimiya — any on-field DPS.

teams.name: Team 3: Navia Double Geo
teams.desc: Navia + Albedo + Bennett + Xiangling. Albedo generates crystallize shards for Navia. Bennett buffs both. Strong synergy with Navia's Geo infusion.

rotation_code: Zhongli hold E → Gorou E Q → Albedo E (inside Gorou field) Q → Itto E → Itto Q → CA spam → Albedo refresh E
mistakes: ❌ Building ATK instead of DEF. Albedo's E damage scales entirely with DEF. ATK% and flat ATK do almost nothing for him.
❌ Not placing E inside buff fields. Albedo's E snapshots DEF on cast. Always cast it inside Gorou's buff field or before Bennett Q expires.
❌ Leveling NA. Albedo is never on-field to use normal attacks. NA level has zero impact on his performance.
❌ Using 4pc Husk without pre-stacking. Husk needs 4 Geo DMG hits for full stacks. Albedo should be first in rotation so he stacks passively. If placed last, his E snapshots 0 stacks.

artifact_why: 4-Piece Husk of Opulent Dreams is the optimal set for Albedo.
